CustomField.description: This field displays the Accounting Profile used to map GL accounts for the journal entry associated with this transaction. If the transaction is linked to a contract, the accounting profile from the contract will be used. If no contract is linked, the system will use the accounting profile from the related account (Lessee) if available, or the default accounting profile set in the Global Accounting Settings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field displays the Accounting Profile used to map GL accounts for the journal entry associated with this transaction. If the transaction is linked to a contract, the accounting profile from the contract will be used. If no contract is linked, the system will use the accounting profile from the related account (Lessee) if available, or the default accounting profile set in the Global Accounting Settings.
CustomField.label: Accounting Profile
